text:
Created attachment 202752
svn diff to add dsbsu to the ports tree.

DSBSu is a simple Qt frontend to FreeBSD's su(1). It allows you to execute
a command as root.

WWW: http://freeshell.de/~mk/projects/dsbsu.html
